name: AI Marketing Suite for Claude Code
description: An AI-powered marketing suite with 15 specialized marketing skills using parallel subagents to audit websites, generate marketing copy, email sequences, ad campaigns, content calendars, competitive intelligence, and produce client-ready PDF reports.

inputs.name: website_url
inputs.description: URL of the website to audit or analyze.

inputs.name: marketing_brief
inputs.description: Brief description or objectives for the marketing campaign or content.

inputs.name: target_audience
inputs.description: Description of the target customer audience for copy and campaign generation.

inputs.name: product_or_service_details
inputs.description: Key features and benefits of the product or service for marketing content creation.

inputs.name: email_sequence_requirements
inputs.description: Details or goals for the email marketing sequences to be generated.

inputs.name: ad_campaign_parameters
inputs.description: Information about the advertising campaign including platforms, goals, and budget.

inputs.name: competitive_market_data
inputs.description: Market or competitor data to generate competitive intelligence reports.

outputs.name: website_audit_report
outputs.description: A detailed audit report of the website including performance and marketing insights.

outputs.name: marketing_copy
outputs.description: Generated marketing copy for campaigns, ads, or content.

outputs.name: email_sequences
outputs.description: Generated sequences of marketing emails tailored for campaigns.

outputs.name: ad_campaign_plans
outputs.description: Strategic plans and copy for ad campaigns.

outputs.name: competitive_intelligence_report
outputs.description: Client-ready report containing competitive market analysis.

patterns: Use of parallel subagents to execute independent marketing skills concurrently
Modular marketing skill agents for audit, copywriting, email generation, ads, and content planning
Automated generation of client-ready PDF reports summarizing findings and strategies
Integration of competitive intelligence within marketing workflows
Template-driven content and sequence generation based on marketing briefs
steps: Receive website URL and marketing brief input
Launch parallel subagents to perform website audit, copy generation, email sequence creation, ad campaigns, and content calendar planning
Aggregate the outputs of all marketing skill subagents
Generate PDF reports for website audits and competitive intelligence
Deliver client-ready marketing content, campaign plans, and calendar outputs
use_cases: Marketing agencies auditing client websites and generating comprehensive marketing strategies
Businesses automating multi-channel marketing content creation including emails and ads
Competitive analysis and market intelligence reporting for strategic planning
Creating scheduled content calendars to manage marketing outputs efficiently
Producing client-ready deliverables summarizing marketing audits and campaign plans

prompt_templates.name: website_audit
prompt_templates.template: Perform a detailed marketing and performance audit on the website: {website_url}

prompt_templates.name: generate_marketing_copy
prompt_templates.template: Create compelling marketing copy for the product/service described as: {product_or_service_details} targeting {target_audience}

prompt_templates.name: email_sequence_creation
prompt_templates.template: Develop an email marketing sequence based on these requirements: {email_sequence_requirements}

prompt_templates.name: ad_campaign_planning
prompt_templates.template: Design an ad campaign including copy and strategy for these parameters: {ad_campaign_parameters}

prompt_templates.name: content_calendar_generation
prompt_templates.template: Create a content calendar aligned with the marketing brief: {marketing_brief}

prompt_templates.name: competitive_intelligence
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the following competitive market data and generate an intelligence report: {competitive_market_data}
